name: Gravity Force
short_description: Gravity Force puts you into the seat of a drone pilot. Steer your spaceship through narrow caves (2.5D) to fulfill your job: locate and retrieve cargo crates without wrecking the ship. The minimalistic controls and realistic physics are easy to learn, but hard to master.
detailed_description:
Please, everyone - try out the demo before buying Gravity Force.

Hi everyone,

The team at Coffeeshock Studios would like to thank you for your interest in our release.

We are fans of hard and demanding video games. We grew up playing them and now we’re making our titles in the same way. However, we fully understand that these games are not for everyone. That is why we’d love it if you tried our demo first and then decided whether or not you’d like to purchase the game. 

As much as we want Gravity Force to sell well on Steam, we also want more to avoid leaving anyone disappointed. We think that this scenario would be a loss for everyone. Giving our demo a try resolves that issue before it even arises. If you’re not a fan of technically demanding flying games, you should also try out the demo first.

We’re incredibly grateful to anyone who considers purchasing Gravity Force. By trying out our demo, you can make sure you’re buying the thing you’ll enjoy. 

We hope you like playing Gravity Force and thank you!


About the Game

Gravity Force puts you into the seat of a drone pilot. Steer your spaceship through narrow caves (2.5D) to fulfill your job: locate and retrieve cargo crates without wrecking the ship.

Parts of the gameplay are closely related to vintage classics like Asteroids, Thrust or - you guessed it - Gravity Force, but with way more realistic physics.
The minimalistic controls and realistic physics are easy to learn, but sometimes hard to master.

Play some relaxed missions just for fun, encounter nasty difficulties, or play highly competitive against other players' highscore / ghost. It's up to you.

supported_languages: English, German, Korean, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, French, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Ukrainian, Polish, Italian, Danish, Turkish, Czech
